resources.string: WebToApp is a tool I developed independently that can quickly convert websites, images, and videos into independent Android applications.\n\nIf you have any questions, suggestions, or ideas, please feel free to contact me!

Forced Run protection service. When enabled, it prevents users from switching to other apps when the app is in Forced Run mode, ensuring focused use. This service only takes effect when you actively turn on the Forced Run function.
When enabled, users need to enter a correct Activation Code to use the app
Secure any website as a standalone App
Let AI automatically select categories based on requirements
The app will automatically fix path issues and inline CSS/JS, but it is recommended to view details for confirmation
Start playing automatically when opening the app
The app will automatically process: path fixing, CSS/JS inlining, encoding conversion, viewport adaptation
Auto switch based on system settings
Add Background Music to the app, supports loop or sequential playback
Briefly describe the purpose of the scheme
The built-in build engine is ready. It supports importing already built projects or using esbuild for simple builds. It is recommended to complete the build of complex projects on a computer.
This will clean the build cache and temporary files.
Click the button below to experience the effect

WebToApp is a tool I developed independently that can quickly convert websites, images, and videos into independent Android applications.\n\nIf you have any questions, suggestions, or ideas, please feel free to contact me!
Your activation code has been successfully verified, app features unlocked
Activation code verified, entering the app shortly
Supports both time and usage limits
Bound to current device after activation
Permanently valid after activation, no restrictions
Valid within specified time after activation
Can be used for a specified number of times after activation
All activation codes copied to clipboard
Are you sure you want to clear all activation codes? This action cannot be undone.
Paste project configuration JSON, other users can import with one tap
This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
Describe the HTML page you want...
Display multiple app icons on the desktop after installation
Only keep the alias icon, hide the main Activity icon
Set number of icons displayed after installation (each starts the app)
Multi-icon function uses native activity-alias mechanism; multiple icons display automatically after install.
Turn on interface transition animations and interaction feedback
Allow JavaScript code execution in HTML
Allow using localStorage to save data
Light Activation code, background music etc. can be configured by clicking Edit after project creation.
App automatically inlines CSS/JS into HTML. Absolute paths are converted. Using relative paths is recommended.
Automatically crop to fill entire screen
Auto switch based on system settings
Display selected image in full screen
Play selected video in full screen
AI automatically checks syntax/security to ensures generated code runs safely.
Manually select categories or let AI auto-detect for precise generation.
Generated code can be directly edited and will save with changes.
Describe features in natural language and AI will generate the expansion code.
Choose different AI models for code generation, each with varying speed and effect.
Describe specific functions, specify the target site or page type.
Once generation is complete, click Save to add it to your module library for future use.
Tip: HTML is required, CSS and JS are optional. If your HTML references them, please select those files as well.
Display app content in landscape orientation
Learn and progress together, update news etc.
The application created will be %s, suitable for digital photo frames, advertising or video wallpaper.
No apps yet. Click + to create
package.json not found, select a valid Node.js project directory
Only takes effect on %d matching URLs
Optional: Install esbuild for better performance
Immersive background effects in enhanced mode
Please select a text model first
Pure Kotlin implementation, no external dependencies
This will delete downloaded build tools. Continue?
Search by name, description or tag...
Select HTML, CSS, JS etc. (CSS/JS optional)
Select project root or build output directory (dist/build)
Support Vue, React, Vite build output
Comma separated, e.g., ad, block, tool
Please authorize usage access permission first
1. Build project on computer: npm run build. 2. Copy build output (dist/build) to phone. 3. Select project folder to import.
